name: cancel
_note: sponsorship.cancel (server.js:76541, MACROS/runMacro path) marks the caller's ACTIVE npc_sponsorships row cancelled via a guarded UPDATE (WHERE id=? AND sponsor_user_id=? AND status='active'). A missing id rejects with reason:'missing_id'. A non-existent / not-owned id returns ok:false cancelled:false (changes==0) — the row is never another user's. The assassin runs with an internal owner actor against a real migrated DB (never no_db). The lens resolves cancel to the LENS_ACTIONS in-memory handler (LENS_ACTIONS wins in /api/lens/run); this DB-backed macro is reached only via runMacro/MCP. No CC is moved on cancel.
